key_points: Rakesh lived with his grandfather in Mussoorie because there were no schools in his parents’ village
One day Rakesh planted a cherry seed in the garden and forgot about it
After some days, a small cherry plant appeared and Rakesh began taking care of it
The plant faced several challenges such as a goat eating its leaves and a grass cutter cutting it with a scythe
Despite the damage, the tree survived and slowly grew into a strong cherry tree
examples: Rakesh placed pebbles around the plant to protect it
The goat destroyed the leaves of the young plant
A woman cutting grass accidentally cut the plant in two
The cherry tree survived the damage and grew new shoots
After several years, the tree produced blossoms and cherries
formulas_or_processes: Beginning → Rakesh plants a cherry seed
Development → The seed grows into a small plant
Conflict → The plant faces damage and challenges
Growth → The tree recovers and becomes stronger
Climax → The tree blossoms and bears fruit
exam_tips: Understand the sequence of events in the story
Focus on the challenges faced by the cherry tree
Remember the importance of patience and care in the story
Explain how the tree symbolizes growth and perseverance
